creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text:
With r248570 everything is working fine:
root@fujisan:~ # zpool status
no pools available
root@fujisan:~ # zpool import
   pool: fujisan
     id: 14401889162690221720
  state: ONLINE
 action: The pool can be imported using its name or numeric identifier.
 config:

        fujisan     ONLINE
          da1d      ONLINE

starting with r248571 ZFS is broken:
root@fujisan:~ # zpool status
failed to read pool configuration: bad address
no pools available
root@fujisan:~ # zpool import
root@fujisan:~ #
r248571 or newer world with r248570 kernel is working.
